flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lehigh Carbon Community College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8k → 4.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lehigh Carbon Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lehigh Carbon Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lehigh Carbon Community College rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (15.3% → 16.9%).
